comment: I am so happy I hired Black Hill Landscaping! These guys know what they are doing. Before hiring I looked up many companies and came to the conclusion these guys are the best.
draft_response: Jack, thank you. Hearing that the work on your property delivered the results you expected confirms we are doing our job right. We look forward to continuing to serve your property.
final_response: That means a lot to us. We know there are plenty of landscaping companies to choose from in the DFW area, so the fact that you did your research and chose Black Hill Landscaping is something we don't take lightly. Looking forward to working with you again.
